title: Add request timing middleware
description: Create middleware in src/middleware/request-timing.ts that measures request duration and adds X-Response-Time header. Include integration test following existing middleware patterns (request-logger.ts, rate-limiter.ts).
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Next.js middleware using NextRequest/NextResponse, factory pattern with config object, X-Response-Time header approach similar to X-Request-Id
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - middleware factory returning function with attached properties (limiter), clean separation of concerns
src/middleware/request-logger.test.ts - vitest with fake timers, helper makeRequest function, comprehensive test coverage patterns
